title: REPO Paintings Resource Pack
description: Resourcepack for datapack which adds paintings from R.E.P.O. to Minecraft
body:
This resourcepack is necessary for the correct work of datapack, which adds 101 paintings from R.E.P.O most of which are from the map «Museum of Human Art». It includes paintings are presented in sizes:
- 1x1 — 3 paintings
- 1x2 — 22 paintings
- 2x1 — 34 paintings
- 2x2 — 8 paintings
- 2x3 — 3 paintings (new minecraft painting size)
- 2x4 — 6 paintings (new minecraft painting size)
- 4x2 — 18 paintings
- 3x3 — 4 paintings
- 4x4 — 3 paintings

It will only work in those worlds where a [datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/repo-paintings-data-pack) is installed for it.
